name: HXT_SCH_PROF_DEFAULT_VIEW
query: SELECT SetupOptionValPEO.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, SetupOptionValPEO.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, SetupOptionValPEO.SETUP_OPTION_VAL_ID SETUP_OPTION_VAL_ID, SetupOptionValPEO.SETUP_OPTION_VAL_CD SETUP_OPTION_VAL_CD, SetupOptionValPEO.TYPE TYPE, SetupOptionValPEO.VALUE50 GROUP_MANAGER_ID, SetupOptionValPEO.VALUE51 OVER_STAFF_THRESHOLD, SetupOptionValPEO.VALUE52 UNDER_STAFF_THRESHOLD, SetupOptionValPEO.VALUE53 FIRST_DAY_OF_WEEK, SetupOptionValPEO.VALUE54 SCHEDULING_GROUP_ID, SetupOptionValPEO.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE1, SetupOptionValPEO.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY1 , SetupOptionValPEO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE1 , SetupOptionValPEO.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN1 , SetupOptionValPEO.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY1, GroupInclMembersPEO.INCL_MEMBER_ID , GroupInclMembersPEO.GRP_INCL_MEMBER_ID, GroupInclMembersPEO.GRP_ID, SetupProfileAsgPEO.SETUP_PROFILE_ASG_ID, SetupProfileAsgPEO.ASSIGN_TO, SetupProfileAsgPEO.DATE_FROM, SetupProfileAsgPEO.DATE_TO, SetupProfileViewPEO.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, SetupProfileViewPEO.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, SetupProfileViewPEO.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, SetupProfileViewPEO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SetupProfileViewPEO.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SetupProfileViewPEO.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, SetupProfileViewPEO.NAME NAME, SetupProfileViewPEO.PRECEDENCE PRECEDENCE, SetupProfileViewPEO.PRODUCT_AREA PRODUCT_AREA, SetupProfileViewPEO.SETUP_PROFILE_CD SETUP_PROFILE_CD, SetupProfileViewPEO.SETUP_PROFILE_ID, SetupProfileViewPEO.SETUP_PROFILE_ID SETUP_PROFILE_ID_TL FROM HXT_SETUP_OPTION_VALS SetupOptionValPEO, HXT_SETUP_PROFILES_VL SetupProfileViewPEO, HXT_SETUP_PROFILE_ASGS SetupProfileAsgPEO, HWM_GRP_INCL_MEMBERS GroupInclMembersPEO WHERE SetupOptionValPEO.SETUP_PROFILE_ID = SetupProfileViewPEO.SETUP_PROFILE_ID AND SetupOptionValPEO.TYPE = SetupProfileViewPEO.PRODUCT_AREA AND SetupProfileViewPEO.SETUP_PROFILE_ID = SetupProfileAsgPEO.SETUP_PROFILE_ID AND SetupProfileAsgPEO.OBJECT_ID = GroupInclMembersPEO.GRP_ID AND UPPER(SetupProfileAsgPEO.ASSIGN_TO) = UPPER('GROUP') AND SetupProfileViewPEO.PRODUCT_AREA = 'HTS' UNION SELECT TO_DATE('31-12-4712','DD-MM-YYYY') EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, TO_DATE('01-01-2002','DD-MM-YYYY') EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, 999999999999999 SETUP_OPTION_VAL_ID, meaning SETUP_OPTION_VAL_CD, 'HTS' TYPE, NVL(HRC_SESSION_UTIL.GET_USER_PERSONID,-1) GROUP_MANAGER_ID, 1 OVER_STAFF_THRESHOLD, 1 UNDER_STAFF_THRESHOLD, 1 FIRST_DAY_OF_WEEK, 999999999999999 SCHEDULING_GROUP_ID, sysdate CREATION_DATE1 , 'HCM_USER10' CREATED_BY1 , sysdate LAST_UPDATE_DATE1 , 'HCM_USER10' LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN1, 'HCM_USER10' LAST_UPDATED_BY1 , NVL(HRC_SESSION_UTIL.GET_USER_PERSONID,-1) INCL_MEMBER_ID, 999999999999999 GRP_INCL_MEMBER_ID, 999999999999999 GRP_ID , 999999999999999 SETUP_PROFILE_ASG_ID, 'GROUP' ASSIGN_TO, TO_DATE('01-01-2002','DD-MM-YYYY') DATE_FROM, TO_DATE('31-12-4712','DD-MM-YYYY') DATE_TO, 'HCM_USER10' CREATED_BY, SYSDATE CREATION_DATE, meaning DESCRIPTION, SYSDATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 'HCM_USER10' LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 'HCM_USER10' LAST_UPDATED_BY, meaning NAME, 0 PRECEDENCE, 'HTS' PRODUCT_AREA, meaning SETUP_PROFILE_CD, 999999999999999 SETUP_PROFILE_ID, 999999999999999 SETUP_PROFILE_ID_TL FROM hcm_lookups WHERE lookup_type='ORA_HWM_SCH_PROF_DEFAULT_NAME'
